Author: bdg
Name: CWLS Go To
Description: Watches Cross-world Linkshell (CWLS1/CWLS2) chat for messages containing a map link and appends a clickable [Go To] link. Clicking it teleports you to the nearest aetheryte via the Teleporter plugin, hopping to the correct world/data center first via the Lifestream plugin if the message points to a different server.
Punchline: Adds a working [Go To] link to CWLS map-link messages.

Author: bdg
Name: Desynth All Command
Description: Adds a /desynthall command that opens the game's desynthesis (materia extraction) window and automatically desynthesizes every item in the list, confirming each dialog and closing each result, using the same technique as PandorasBox's Desynth All feature. Self-contained - PandorasBox is not required. Temporarily pauses Yes Already's own dialog handling if it's installed, to avoid it racing with the confirmation step.
Punchline: Opens the desynthesis window and desynthesizes everything in it.

Author: bdg
Name: Logout On Tell
Description: When enabled, automatically logs your character out (with confirmation dialog handled) as soon as you receive a tell (private message) from anyone. Toggle it with /logoutontell (or /logoutontell on|off|status). Always starts disabled: the switch resets every time you log in, so you arm it deliberately each session.
Punchline: Automatically logs you out when you receive a tell.

Author: bdg
Name: Mod Guard
Description: Keeps your mods private: when a mod-sync plugin (Lightless, Snowcloak, Sphene, PlayerSync, or any Mare Synchronos fork - the watch list is editable) is loaded, Mod Guard hides all your Penumbra mods by force-assigning an empty temporary collection to your character, and reverts + locks your Glamourer state, so sync plugins have nothing to share. Once the sync plugins are gone (or on demand), it restores everything exactly as it was - your real Penumbra collection, mod settings, and captured Glamourer state are never lost. Hidden state never spans a logout: it is restored as you log out and re-hidden fresh right after the next login, because a hidden state that goes stale across a relog left the character black. Use /modguard to open the control window. Requires Penumbra; Glamourer optional.
Punchline: Hides your Penumbra mods and Glamourer state while mod-sync plugins are active.

Author: bdg
Name: Typo Guard
Description: On Latin American keyboard layouts, / is Shift+7, so a missed Shift sends "7artisan" into chat instead of running /artisan. Typo Guard intercepts outgoing chat and blocks any message that starts with a 7 followed by a letter, printing what it blocked instead of sending it. If you really meant to send such a message, send it again within 5 seconds and it goes through. Toggle with /typoguard (also accepts on/off/status); the setting persists.
Punchline: Blocks chat messages that start with 7 - mistyped slash commands.

Author: bdg
Name: Mod Snap
Description: Adds a 'Save Mods + Appearance' entry to the right-click menu on players (and a /modsnap command for your current target). It snapshots everything currently applied to that character - including mods streamed in by sync plugins like PlayerSync or Mare forks - by driving Penumbra's own Character Pack (PCP) export and immediately installing the result: the mods land in your Penumbra library under the PCP folder, a 'PCP/<name>' collection is created and assigned, and Glamourer creates a ready-to-apply design named after the player (with the mod already associated). The .pcp file itself is kept in Penumbra's export folder so you can archive or share it. Requires a current Penumbra with Character Pack support; Glamourer with 'Attach to PCP' enabled (default) for the design.
Punchline: Right-click a player to save their current mods and appearance into Penumbra and Glamourer.

Author: bdg
Name: Auto Lister
Description: Adds an 'Auto List' button next to Dagobert's 'Auto Pinch' on the retainer sell list. Clicking it goes through every marketable item shown in the bottom-right quarter of the inventory (the last display page, as sorted on screen), puts each up for sale, opens the price comparison, undercuts the cheapest matching HQ/NQ listing by 1 gil and confirms - until the quarter has no more sellable items or the retainer's 20 sell slots are full. Items whose listing would total under 2,000 gil (price x quantity), or whose vendor price beats the market proceeds after the 5% sales tax, are sold through the retainer instead of taking up a market slot. The price-checking logic mirrors Dagobert's auto pinch.
Punchline: One-click bulk market listing: prices every sellable inventory item like Dagobert and puts it up for sale.

Author: bdg
Name: Gem Rate
Description: Watches your Bicolor Gemstone count and shows a small window with the current total, how many you gained this session, your earn rate per hour (whole session and the last 15 minutes), and the estimated time until you hit the 1,500 cap. The session clock starts at your first gain so idle time before farming doesn't skew the rate. /gemrate toggles the window.
Punchline: Tracks how many bicolor gemstones you earn per hour.

Author: bdg
Name: Faloop Screener
Description: Logs into your Faloop account and shows the current S/SS-rank spawn windows in a table (/windows): world, hunt, zone, time open, window progress and cap time, computed from Faloop's live tracker state - accurate even for kills that happened while you were offline. Filter by world (Crystal data center), hide zones or specific hunts you don't care about, and click Spawn on any row to see that hunt's spawn trigger. Requires a Faloop account with tracker access; credentials are stored in the plugin config like Faloop Integration does.
Punchline: S-rank spawn windows from Faloop, filterable, with spawn conditions.

Author: bdg
Name: CBT
Description: Tweaks that are sometimes simple, sometimes not.
